title: DarkerNeon purple
description: Gui made with neon style, named DarkerNeon
body:
![Darker Neon Gui Purple](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b8eafb38b39f7b169ff87b969d33a6ae67248cd9.png)
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7988702bd01f4efe053d7f9a0330bdf4158657dc.png)

**This is now the ONLY version**:
- Hud icons change
- Menu background image
- Widgets menu textures
- survival and adventure inventory
- creative inventory
- all the containers from all the tables made, even villager inventory, horses, and all the others
